title: CyberTip Triage — 90-Second Investigator Demo
description: A concise walkthrough of CyberTip Triage for ICAC task forces, demonstrating AI-powered prioritization, Wilson compliance automation, and warrant workflow integration.
target_audience: ICAC investigators and supervisors evaluating triage automation tools

cues.narration: Every ICAC unit faces the same problem: thousands of NeCMEC tips, limited investigators, and zero room for compliance error. CyberTip Triage was built for exactly this.
cues.caption: The tip volume problem

cues.narration: The dashboard gives you real-time visibility. Stats cards show total tips, pending actions, and compliance status at a glance.
cues.caption: Real-time operational picture

cues.narration: Every incoming tip is scored by AI and assigned a priority tier — from Immediate down to Monitor. No manual sorting required.
Filter to Immediate tier to surface tips with active victim crisis indicators first.
cues.caption: Crisis-first prioritization

cues.narration: Select the top tip to open the detail pane. The system pulls in all NeCMEC data automatically.
Notice the cluster alert — this tip is linked to a viral distribution bundle. Duplicate tips collapse into one actionable lead.
cues.caption: Bundle deduplication

cues.narration: Now let's look at the files tab, where Wilson compliance is enforced automatically.
When the ESP did not view an attachment before forwarding, the system blocks investigator access. This protects Fourth Amendment compliance without slowing your workflow.
cues.caption: Wilson v. Azar compliance

cues.narration: To access blocked files, initiate the warrant workflow directly from here. One click marks the application as submitted and begins tracking.
cues.caption: Integrated warrant workflow

cues.narration: When the warrant is granted, blocked files automatically unlock. Full audit trail preserved for prosecution.
Each tip includes circuit-specific legal guidance tailored to your jurisdiction, so your team stays current on relevant case law.
cues.caption: Circuit-specific legal notes

cues.narration: Supervisors access the Tier Four panel for queue management, workload balancing, and compliance oversight across the entire unit.
cues.caption: Supervisor oversight

cues.narration: On-call investigators get a streamlined mobile interface for after-hours immediate-tier alerts. Nothing falls through the cracks.
CyberTip Triage. Fewer missed tips. Bulletproof compliance. Investigators focused where it matters.
cues.caption: CyberTip Triage — Purpose-built for ICAC
